seo.title: Custom Cabinets in Spokane | Semi-Custom Kitchen, Bath & Laundry | Cabinets Plus
seo.description: Semi-custom kitchen, bath, and laundry cabinets sized to your Spokane home. Shaker, modern, traditional, and inset panel doors — compared in person at our Sprague Avenue showroom, installed in-house.

blocks.heading: Cabinets Built to Last, Designed to Fit
blocks.subtext: Quality semi-custom kitchen and bathroom cabinets in every style — modern, shaker, traditional — designed by our Spokane team and built to fit your space, your storage needs, and your budget.

blocks.title: One Showroom, Every Kind of Project
blocks.paragraphs: Whether you're a homeowner planning your forever kitchen, a contractor juggling three builds at once, or a flipper trying to turn a property fast without cutting corners, we've got you covered. Cabinets Plus stocks semi-custom cabinets in a wide range of styles, finishes, and price points — so you can spec a high-end primary residence one week and a tight-budget rental flip the next, all from the same showroom. Same honest pricing, same straight answers, no matter the scale.

blocks.title: From First Sketch to Final Install

steps.title: Showroom Visit & Style Consultation
steps.description: Come look at door samples, finishes, and full kitchen displays in person. Our designers walk you through styles, hardware, and storage upgrades that fit your goals and budget.

steps.title: Design & Layout
steps.description: Bring your room measurements (or let us measure) and we'll draft a layout that maximizes storage, traffic flow, and sightlines. We'll show you 3D renderings so you can see it before you commit.

steps.title: Order & Build
steps.description: Once you approve the design, we place the order with our trusted manufacturers. Lead times vary by line, but we'll give you a clear timeline up front and keep you posted along the way.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Our installers handle delivery, leveling, and finish carpentry — toe kicks, crown, fillers, and hardware. Prefer DIY? We provide install guides and how-to videos to help you tackle it yourself.

blocks.title: Don't Buy Cabinets You've Never Touched
blocks.paragraphs:
Cabinets are one of the biggest investments in any remodel, and the difference between a great set and a regretful one usually shows up in details you can only judge in person. The weight of the door when you open it. Whether the drawer glides feel solid or flimsy. How the soft-close actually closes. Whether the finish has real depth or looks painted on under bright lights. None of that comes through on a website thumbnail.

That's why we built our Spokane showroom the way we did — full kitchen vignettes, working drawers and doors, and door samples you can take home to compare against your paint colors. Bring your countertop and flooring samples. Bring photos of the room. Our team will walk you through what sets one line apart from the next — plywood boxes versus particle board, dovetail drawers versus stapled, soft-close versus standard — so you know exactly what you're paying for.

We carry semi-custom cabinets, which means real flexibility in sizing, door styles, finishes, and storage upgrades without the lead times and price tag of fully custom builds. For most Spokane homes, it's the sweet spot — better than stock, smarter than the alternative, and ready to ship in a fraction of the time.

blocks.heading: Build the Kitchen You Actually Want
blocks.subtext: From sleek modern slabs to timeless shaker fronts in every color imaginable, Cabinets Plus has the cabinet styles, finishes, and storage solutions to bring your Spokane kitchen to life.

faqs.question: How much do new kitchen cabinets cost in Spokane?
faqs.answer: For an average-size kitchen, expect $5,000–$15,000 for entry-level semi-custom cabinets and $15,000–$30,000 for higher-end semi-custom lines with premium finishes, soft-close hardware, and storage upgrades. Pricing depends on material, finish, hardware, and how much storage you build in. We give detailed itemized quotes so you know exactly what you're paying for.

faqs.question: What does "semi-custom" actually mean?
faqs.answer: Semi-custom cabinets are pre-engineered cabinet lines that let you adjust sizes, door styles, finishes, and storage upgrades within a manufacturer's options. You get far more flexibility than stock cabinets, but with shorter lead times and lower cost than fully custom builds — which makes them the best fit for most Spokane homes.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get new cabinets installed?
faqs.answer: Typical lead times run 4–8 weeks from order to delivery, plus 2–5 days for installation depending on kitchen size. We'll confirm timing before you commit so you can plan around it.

faqs.question: Can I just replace cabinet doors instead of full cabinets (refacing)?
faqs.answer: In some cases, yes. If your existing cabinet boxes are solid plywood or quality construction, refacing with new doors and drawer fronts can save significant money. If the boxes are damaged or poorly built, full replacement is usually the better long-term value. We'll evaluate during your consultation.

faqs.question: What cabinet styles are most popular in Spokane right now?
faqs.answer: Shaker remains the most popular by a wide margin — it pairs with modern, traditional, and farmhouse looks equally well. White and off-white finishes still lead, but navy, sage, charcoal, and natural wood tones are gaining ground fast, especially on islands and bathroom vanities.

faqs.question: Do you offer cabinet installation, or just sales?
faqs.answer: Both. We sell cabinets to homeowners, contractors, and DIYers, and we offer professional installation as part of our remodeling service. If you're handy and want to install them yourself, we provide guidance and how-to resources to help.

faqs.question: Are your cabinets made of real wood or particle board?
faqs.answer: We carry a range of construction qualities. Higher-end lines feature solid plywood boxes, solid wood doors, and dovetail drawer construction. Budget-friendly lines use engineered wood with veneers or thermofoil. We'll walk you through exactly what each option is built from so you know what you're buying.

faqs.question: Do you serve contractors and house flippers in the Spokane area?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. A big part of our business is supplying contractors, real estate investors, and property managers throughout Spokane and North Idaho with reliable cabinets at competitive bulk pricing. Ask about our contractor program.
